proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records identify STV Inc./STV, the same engineering/consulting firm; the target is the richer multi-source STV record and the alias is a one-source STV Inc. address record.
proposed_durable_decisions.validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_stv-20100615 and entity_stv-inc share identity key entity_stv-inc.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records identify the New York City Transit Committee / NYCT Committee context; target is the richer committee/member cluster.
proposed_durable_decisions.validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-140466-nyct-committee-members and entity_nyct-committee-2023 share identity key entity_nyct-committee.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records identify New York City Transit Committee members; target is the richer committee/member cluster.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records are NYCT/Bus Committee or Committee on Operations records in MTA Board context; the target is the richer NYCT committee/member cluster. Keep as committee alias, not as agency merge.
proposed_durable_decisions.validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-140466-nyct-committee-members and entity_nyct-mta-bus-committee-charter share identity key entity_nyct-committee.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MaBSTOA and MTA Bus Company are distinct MTA bus-operating entities; shared Manhattan/Bronx surface transit keys on MTA Bus are contamination.
proposed_durable_decisions.validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_mabstoa and entity_mta-bus-company share identity key entity_manhattan-and-bronx-surface-transit-operating-authority.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Department of Buses is an organization/unit; Frank Farrell EVP record is a person/officer context. The NYCT key is affiliation contamination.
proposed_durable_decisions.validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_department-of-buses and entity_mta-nyct-evp-frank-farrell share identity key entity_mta-nyct.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Metro-North committee context and NYCT agency are distinct; shared Metro-North railroad key on NYCT is cross-record contamination.
proposed_durable_decisions.validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-102746-committee and entity_mta-nyct share identity key entity_metro-north-commuter-railroad-company.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: LIRR is a railroad agency/subsidiary; MTA Headquarters is an administrative/HQ unit. The LIRR key on HQ is contamination.
proposed_durable_decisions.validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_annual-report-2021-lirr and entity_meeting-doc-143306-mta-hq share identity key entity_long-island-rail-rd.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTA Headquarters and Access-A-Ride/paratransit service context are distinct; shared MTA key is parent-acronym contamination.
proposed_durable_decisions.validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-143306-mta-hq and entity_meeting-doc-154986-aar share identity key entity_mta.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Access-A-Ride/paratransit service context is not the parent Metropolitan Transportation Authority record.
proposed_durable_decisions.validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-154986-aar and entity_meeting-doc-64066-mta share identity key entity_metropolitan-transportation-authority-mta.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTA Headquarters is an HQ/administrative unit cluster; the other record is parent Metropolitan Transportation Authority. Do not collapse unit into parent.
proposed_durable_decisions.validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-143306-mta-hq and entity_meeting-doc-64066-mta share identity key entity_mta.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTA Headquarters and DDCR/diversity-civil-rights context are distinct units/contexts; shared MTA acronym is not identity.
proposed_durable_decisions.validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-143306-mta-hq and entity_meeting-doc-ddcr share identity key entity_mta.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTA Headquarters and MTA Bridges and Tunnels/TBTA are distinct MTA entities.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTA Headquarters and MTA Bus Company are distinct MTA entities.
proposed_durable_decisions.validator_evidence: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-143306-mta-hq and entity_mta-bus-company share identity key entity_mta.
